sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n98148" key="sukwtiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῡκ-ωτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n98148.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for piles, medicamentum</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0733.tlg001:74" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cass.Fel.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">74</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
